Package io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.response.ack

Class DefaultServerAckProcessorHandler

java.lang.Object
io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.response.ack.DefaultServerAckProcessorHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
ServerAckProcessorHandler
@Component @ConditionalOnMissingBean(ServerAckProcessorHandler.class) public class DefaultServerAckProcessorHandler extends Object implements ServerAckProcessorHandler
默认ACK处理器实现
